mapper.insert: insert into erp_inventory_balance( warehouse_id, warehouse_name, sku_id, sku_code, sku_name, available_qty, locked_qty, inbound_qty, defective_qty, safety_qty, cost_price, create_time, update_time ) values( #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseName}, #{skuId}, #{skuCode}, #{skuName}, #{availableQty}, 0, 0, #{defectiveQty}, #{safetyQty}, #{costPrice}, sysdate(), sysdate() )
mapper.update: update erp_inventory_balance set available_qty = #{availableQty}, defective_qty = #{defectiveQty}, cost_price = #{costPrice}, update_time = sysdate() where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and sku_id = #{skuId}
mapper.insert: insert into erp_inventory_cost_layer( warehouse_id, sku_id, batch_no, source_type, source_no, remain_qty, cost_price, inbound_date, create_time ) values( #{warehouseId}, #{skuId}, #{batchNo}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceNo}, #{remainQty}, #{costPrice}, #{inboundDate}, sysdate() )
